artifacts.summary: Partial infrastructure for FMCS over Rat via Cantor isomorphism

partial_progress.details: Created CanonicalEmbedding.lean with FMCS over Rat via Cantor isomorphism. 5 sorries remain: (1) ratFMCS_forward_F/backward_P need proof that staged timeline witnesses transfer to TimelineQuot, (2) modal_backward needs multi-family BFMCS with modal saturation, (3) ratFMCS_root_eq needs proof connecting timelineQuotMCS to root

errors.message: ratFMCS_forward_F requires showing staged timeline F-witnesses appear in TimelineQuot. canonical_forward_F provides witness MCS but need to prove it's in the dense timeline.
errors.recommendation: Check StagedExecution.lean for F-witness inclusion proof pattern

errors.message: modal_backward for singleton BFMCS requires modal saturation, which requires Diamond phi -> phi for each family. This is NOT automatic.
errors.recommendation: Consider multi-family BFMCS construction following ModalSaturation.lean pattern
